things.name: Gaudi Centre Reus
things.description: Interactive museum dedicated to Antoni Gaudi, born in Reus in 1852

things.name: Modernist Architecture Route
things.description: Self-guided tour of Reus's remarkable collection of Catalan Modernista buildings

things.name: Casa Navàs
things.description: Spectacular Modernista mansion by Lluís Domènech i Montaner, a masterpiece of the style

things.name: Prim Square
things.description: Historic main square with the Prim statue and surrounding medieval buildings

things.name: Reus Museum
things.description: Archaeological and art collections tracing the city's history from prehistoric times

things.name: Church of Sant Pere
things.description: Gothic church with an octagonal bell tower dominating the city skyline

things.name: Mercadal Market Hall
things.description: Cast-iron covered market in the heart of the old town

things.name: Port Aventura World
things.description: One of Europe's largest theme parks just 10km from the city centre

things.name: Tarragona Roman Ruins
things.description: UNESCO Roman city with amphitheatre, circus and forum just 15km away

things.name: Delta de l'Ebre
things.description: Spectacular Ebro Delta nature reserve with flamingos and pristine beaches
